arts.ttl: Di Francesco: “Parma Strong on the Counter, More Absences Tomorrow. On Zerbin…”
arts.sum: Venezia are preparing for their away match against Parma, a direct clash amidst numerous transfer rumours, and the official announcement of Alessio Zerbin's arrival from Napoli coming just hours ago. Coach Eusebio Di Francesco spoke at a press conference to preview the match, highlighting the danger that Parma can pose them. The post Di Francesco: “Parma Strong on the Counter, More Absences Tomorrow. On Zerbin…” appeared first on FootItalia.com.

Parma are coming off a 1-0 defeat to Genoa that still leaves them above the relegation zone, albeit by a point. Venezia also conceded a 1-0 defeat to Inter on Sunday and had some late chances to snat...

arts.ttl: Serie A | Parma v Venezia: Match Preview
arts.sum: This Sunday, the Stadio Tardini will host a vital encounter as Parma takes on Venezia in a match that promises to be crucial for both teams' aspirations in Serie A. With both clubs currently hovering near the relegation zone, the stakes couldn't be higher as they vie for three essential points. The post Serie A | Parma v Venezia: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.
